name: HRA_TMPL_DEFNS_B
description: This table stores the structure and process for creating performance evaluations that contains the rules and configuration for the various business processes and participants that will be be part of the evaluation e.g. Annual Review.

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_DEFN_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of Template Definition.

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Identifies template type of the performance document.

columns.Name: USE_CALC_RATINGS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if section rating needs to be set based on calculated value.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: SET_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies a set of reference data shared across business units and other entities. Also known as Reference Data Sets, they are used to filter reference data in transactional UIs.

columns.Name: DOC_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key of Document Type.

columns.Name: PROCESS_FLOW_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the Process Flow definiton that is used in this template definiton.

columns.Name: DATE_FROM
columns.Comments: This is the date when the performance template is valid from.

columns.Name: DATE_TO
columns.Comments: This is the last day that the performance template is valid.

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Status of the Performance Template.

columns.Name: CALCULATE_RATINGS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates that the system should calculate the ratings for a section or a document.

columns.Name: ROUNDING_RULE_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the rounding rule that will be used for ratings that are calculated by the system. Valid values are Standard, Up and Down.

columns.Name: DECIMAL_PLACES
columns.Comments: Indicates the number of decimal places for calculated ratings.

columns.Name: MAPPING_METHOD_CODE
columns.Comments: This applies to the Overall Rating section, where the system must choose an overall rating from the rating model, based on a calculated rating.

columns.Name: SHOW_PARTICIPANT_NAMES
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to display participant names to worker.

columns.Name: SELECT_MGR_ALLOWED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether worker can select manager when generating document.

columns.Name: STAR_RATING_ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to use star rating model or not.

columns.Name: SET_ROLE_MINIMUMS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether to set the minimum number for each role and also the total number for the evaluation.

columns.Name: SET_ROLE_MAXIMUMS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether to set the maximum number for each role and also the total number for the evaluation.

columns.Name: TOTAL_MIN_PARTICIPANTS
columns.Comments: Stores the total minimum number of participants required in the document

columns.Name: TOTAL_MAX_PARTICIPANTS
columns.Comments: Stores the total maximum number of participants required in the document

columns.Name: ENFORCE_MIN_PCPNS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether to enforce minimum number of participants allowed in the document.

columns.Name: USE_WRK_CONNECTIONS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether to show  the search by workers' network connections in the social product when adding participants

columns.Name: WRK_SEE_MGR_PCPN_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether worker can see the participants added by manager

columns.Name: PCPN_FEEDBACK_REQ_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the participant feedback is required

columns.Name: PCPN_DECLINE_OPTION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether to give the participant the option whether to Accept/Decline the feedback request

columns.Name: AUTO_POPULATE_MM_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicate matrix managers are automatically populated as participants when performance document is created.

columns.Name: SEND_REQUEST_TO_MM_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates request will be sent to matrix manager particpants when performance document is created, which automatically gives them access to the document.

columns.Name: DEFAULT_MATRIX_PCPN_ROLE_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates default matrix role to use when automatically populating matrix managers as participants.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: DIGITAL_SIGNATURE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Display digital signature flag.

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: KUDOS_REGION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Display kudos region flag.

columns.Name: SHOW_WKR_CALC_RATING_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the Calculated Ratings should be visible to Worker.

columns.Name: SHOW_MGR_CALC_RATING_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the Calculated Ratings should be visible to Manager.

columns.Name: SHOW_MM_CALC_RATING_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether calculated ratings should be visible to matrix managers.

columns.Name: SHOW_PCPN_CALC_RATING_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether calculated ratings should be visible to participants.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: ESS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Stores request id of the last ESS job submitted for this performance template

columns.Name: ESS_REQUEST_STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores request status of the last ESS job submitted for this performance template

columns.Name: SHOW_CHECK_IN_REGION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the CheckIn region should display in performance document.

columns.Name: SHOW_FEEDBACK_REQ_REGION_FLAG
columns.Comments: indicates if the feedback request region should display in the performance document.

columns.Name: ENABLE_SYNC_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the performance template is configured to use synchronized goals

columns.Name: ALLOW_WKR_SELECT_MM_ROLE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Allow worker to select matrix manager role.

columns.Name: ALLOW_MGR_SELECT_MM_ROLE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Allow manager to select matrix manager role.

columns.Name: ALL_MM_MGR_TYPE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Specify all manager types for auto population as participants.

columns.Name: MM_MANAGER_TYPES
columns.Comments: Specify manager types for auto population as participants.

columns.Name: MIN_LENGTH_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Minimum Length of comments

columns.Name: MAX_LENGTH_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Maximum Length of comments

columns.Name: SHOW_CHECK_IN_SUMMARY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the CheckIn summary should display in performance document.

columns.Name: SHOW_FEEDBACK_REQ_SUMMARY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the feedback request summary should display in the performance document.
